events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding stages worldwide! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Memories
angles.copy: Forty-five years since MTV changed the game! From its first video to TRL, it redefined how we consumed music. What was your must-watch MTV show or video?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, propelling them to global stardom.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and introduced us to a new era of Britpop. An absolute essential for any music fan. Which track still gives you chills?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A festival that truly shaped a generation. What's your favourite performance from the legendary event?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering The King, Elvis Presley, today. His impact on music and culture remains immeasurable. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix today. His revolutionary guitar work continues to inspire generations. What's the Hendrix track that truly blows your mind?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969, featuring iconic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Something'.

angles.name: Crosswalk Classic
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs – pure magic. What's your favourite moment from this timeless record?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the iconic frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice and attitude continue to captivate. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a formidable solo artist, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! From Oasis anthems to his solo success, he's still a true rock 'n' roll star. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975, four years after its initial album release.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' became a UK single. A timeless call for peace and unity that resonates as strongly today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007 and all the incredible theme tunes and adventures. What's your favourite Bond film or song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon, a visionary musician and peace activist.

angles.name: Remembering Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon song?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The celebrated British comedian, actor, and writer, John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is undeniable. What's your favourite Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A sprawling, eclectic masterpiece that showcased their diverse talents. What are your standout tracks from this iconic record?
